name: Manolo

historicalPattern.summary: Aggressive 2022 cut (~55 lbs peak to trough) followed by near-complete regain through 2023. This is the pattern to break. Current protocol is designed for sustainable loss through the grind zone, not aggressive cutting.

keyYears.2020-2021: avg 208.6 lbs, started ~178, climbed to ~235 peak
keyYears.2021: avg 222.4 lbs, volatile, ended trending up to ~238
keyYears.2022: avg 215.9 lbs, dropped hard from ~238 to ~183 by September, then rebounded
keyYears.2023: avg 204.6 lbs, near complete regain from the 2022 cut, climbed to ~227 by December
keyYears.2024: avg 229 lbs, relatively flat range ~220-238, ended at ~238
keyYears.2025: avg 236.4 lbs, mostly flat until October drop, slight uptick end of year
keyYears.2026-Q1: avg 231.8 lbs, sharp downward trend to ~218 by April

eatingProtocol.decisionFilter: Protein-to-calorie ratio is the primary food choice metric
eatingProtocol.loggingHabit: Does not always log meals. When nutrition data is missing for a day, assume he ate similar to the most recent logged day — do NOT assume he skipped eating or fasted.

proteinStrategy.primarySources: canned albacore tuna, sardines, smoked trout, chicken tenderloins, Greek yogurt, ground turkey, shrimp, tofu, hard boiled eggs, Isopure Zero Carb whey isolate (2 scoops standard)

supplements: creatine monohydrate 3-5g daily, LMNT electrolytes, Isopure whey protein isolate

workoutSplit.details: Gym = heavy compound lifts. Rowing = Concept2 intervals or steady-state.

refeedCadence.protocol: Higher calorie OMAD day with higher carbs and maintained protein
refeedCadence.purpose: Addresses leptin signaling without breaking eating window
refeedCadence.trigger: Also triggered if 3+ days of declining recovery scores

coachingProfile.experience: Experienced with weight loss cycles, understands the mechanics
coachingProfile.style: Does not need basic education, needs specific data-driven coaching. Knows the difference between water retention stalls and true metabolic adaptation. Responds to direct, specific recommendations not menus of options.
coachingProfile.primaryRisk: Jul-Aug grind zone where motivation erodes and protocol breaks down

insightRules.sleepWarning: Flag sleep below 65% for 3+ consecutive nights as metabolic warning
insightRules.rollingWindow: Use 3-5 day rolling window for weight and recovery correlation, not single day readings
insightRules.workoutPrescription: Prescribe tomorrow's workout intensity based on recovery score
insightRules.stallInterpretation: Distinguish water retention stalls from true metabolic adaptation
insightRules.refeedTiming: Factor refeed timing into recovery score interpretation

recoveryThresholds.below50: Recommend lower intensity or active recovery only
recoveryThresholds.50to70: Proceed with planned session, moderate intensity

insightRules.metabolicRisk: Sleep performance below 65% for 3+ nights: flag metabolic risk, recommend refeed consideration
